title: Phaeneilema paraguayense
taxonomy: Phaeneilema paraguayense is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to South America and is part of the Eragrostideae subfamily. The classification of Phaeneilema paraguayense is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Poaceae, subfamily Eragrostideae, tribe Eragrosteae. Phaeneilema paraguayense is closely related to other species within the Eragrostideae subfamily. Its classification is an important aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
